subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice, thanks for reaching out! I'm glad to hear you're interested in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

We're available for an introductory call this week — our preferred slots are Tuesday between 10 AM and 12 PM UTC, or Thursday between 2 PM and 4 PM UTC. Let me know if either of these work for your team, or feel free to suggest an alternative time that fits your schedule.

Regarding contact details: our internal directory and employee direct contact information are not shared externally for privacy and security reasons. Once we align on the collaboration scope during our introductory call, we'll be happy to introduce you to the relevant team members directly, including our technical leadership when the time is right.

Looking forward to your reply!
Best regards
